Package net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element

Class Checkbox

java.lang.Object
net.pl3x.guithium.api.key.Keyed
net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element.AbstractElement<Rect<LabeledRect<Checkbox>>>
net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element.Rect<LabeledRect<Checkbox>>
net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element.LabeledRect<Checkbox>
net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element.Checkbox
All Implemented Interfaces:
Element, JsonSerializable
public class Checkbox extends LabeledRect<Checkbox>
Represents a checkbox element.

    • isSelected

      @Nullable public Boolean isSelected()
      Get the selected state.

      If null, default false state will be used.

      Returns:
      True if selected

    • setSelected

      @NotNull public Checkbox setSelected(@Nullable Boolean selected)
      Set the selected state.

      If null, default false state will be used.

      Parameters:
      selected - Selected state
      Returns:
      This checkbox

    • isShowLabel

      @Nullable public Boolean isShowLabel()
      Get if we should show text label.

      If null, text label will be shown.

      Returns:
      True to show text label

    • setShowLabel

      @NotNull public Checkbox setShowLabel(@Nullable Boolean showLabel)
      Set if we should show text label.

      If null, text label will be shown.

      Parameters:
      showLabel - True to show text label
      Returns:
      This checkbox
